title: At the Bookstore 书店
scene: Tom去书店买一本字典和一本故事书。

lines.en: Hello, I'm looking for an English-Chinese dictionary.
lines.zh: 你好，我在找一本英汉词典。

lines.en: We have several dictionaries. Which grade are you in?
lines.zh: 我们有几种词典。你上几年级？

lines.en: I'm in fifth grade. I need one for primary school students.
lines.zh: 我上五年级。我需要一本适合小学生的。

lines.en: This one is perfect for you. It has simple explanations.
lines.zh: 这本很适合你。解释很简单明了。

lines.en: How much is it? Can I look inside first?
lines.zh: 多少钱？我能先看看里面吗？

lines.en: Of course! It's thirty-eight yuan. Very affordable.
I like it! I'll take it. Do you have any books about space?
lines.zh: 我喜欢！我要了。你们有关于太空的书吗？

lines.en: Yes! 'The Solar System' is a great book. Full of pictures.
lines.zh: 有的！《太阳系》是一本很棒的书。有很多图片。

lines.en: That sounds perfect! I love learning about planets.
lines.zh: 听起来太完美了！我喜欢学习关于行星的知识。

lines.en: It's twenty-five yuan. Total is sixty-three yuan.
lines.zh: 二十五元。总共六十三元。
